set: Expansion Deck Box Set 08: Magnificent Collection - Forsaken Warrior
ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Son Goku'. Figure in orange-and-blue gi with spiky dark hair in base form running toward viewer matches Son Goku's canonical design. Collector number BT4-078 traces to Colossal Warfare (Saiyan Saga era). Verified via card name and Bandai official card database.

trivia_bullets.text: BT4-078 originates in Colossal Warfare (BT4), the fourth main booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, and was reprinted as a promotional card (PR) in Magnificent Collection: Forsaken Warrior (DBS-BE08), a 2019 expansion box set themed around Broly. The Forsaken Warrior product released November 22, 2019, and includes 18 new promo cards alongside a Broly structure deck. [TCGplayer: Magnificent Collection Forsaken Warrior product page]
sources: TCGplayer: Expansion Deck Box Set 08 product page
Wild Things Games retailer listing BT4-078 PR

trivia_bullets.text: The card is a Yellow Battle card with Power 15,000 and energy cost 2 Yellow. Its skill is Swap 3 (YY): 'Goku's Lineage' with energy cost 3 — allowing the player to exchange it from the field for a higher-cost Goku's Lineage card from hand and return Dependable Dynasty Son Goku to hand. This swap-chain mechanic makes it a value-setting tool in Goku's Lineage ramp strategies. [Pricecharting.com card entry BT4-078; Wild Things Games retailer listing]
sources: Pricecharting.com: Dependable Dynasty Son Goku BT4-078
Wild Things Games BT4-078 PR listing

trivia_bullets.text: The card's 'Saiyan Saga' era designation places this Goku specifically in his early-Dragon Ball Z power tier — pre-Super Saiyan, pre-Namek — consistent with the base-form art and the 'Dependable Dynasty' title framing him as the founding figure of a warrior lineage rather than a peak-power form. [Pricecharting.com card entry BT4-078]
sources: Pricecharting.com: Dependable Dynasty Son Goku BT4-078
